errors.unauthorized: Session expired — please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to that.
errors.apiUnreachable: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

hero.subtitle: Kaibot replies to your customers on WhatsApp 24/7 — answering questions, qualifying leads, and handing off to a human only when it truly matters.
hero.chatPreviewUser1: Hi! Do you ship to Mexico?
hero.chatPreviewBot1: Yes, we ship across all of Mexico — usually 2-4 business days. Want me to pass you a shipping quote?

features.title: Built so customers never wait.
features.subtitle: A focused set of capabilities — no fluff, no setup gymnastics.
features.alwaysOnBody: Kaibot answers every message in seconds — at 3 AM, on weekends, during launches. No customer is left hanging.
features.nativeBody: Plugs into the channel your customers already use every day. No app to download, no new habits to learn.
features.trainedBody: Upload your docs, FAQs, and policies. Kaibot learns your voice and answers like part of your team.

how.title: Up and running in minutes.
how.step1Body: Link your business number in a couple of clicks. No code, no complicated setup.
how.step2Body: Upload documents, pricing, and FAQs. Kaibot reads everything and is ready in under an hour.
how.step3Body: Kaibot replies on its own and pings a human only when the conversation truly needs one.

cta.title: Give your business a 24/7 assistant.
cta.subtitle: Sign in to your company workspace and start replying faster than ever.

login.title: Sign in with email
login.subtitle: Manage your bots, conversations, and customers in one place.

register.title: Register your company
register.subtitle: Creates a tenant and an OWNER user to manage your bots.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.
register.errorSlugFormat: Slug must be kebab-case (lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Snapshot of your bots, conversations and customers.
dashboard.recentConversationsHint: Latest activity across all your bots.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Account details and password for your user. Only you can change this — not even the platform team has access to your password.
profile.emailRoleNote: Email and role can only be changed by an OWNER from the tenant's user management screen.
profile.changePasswordSubtitle: You'll stay signed in. Use the new password on your next sign-in.
profile.successMessage: Password updated. Use the new password on your next sign-in.
profile.sessionSubtitle: End your current session on this browser.
profile.planSectionSubtitle: Current subscription tied to your workspace. Plan limits apply to the whole tenant.
profile.botsAtLimitNote: You've reached your plan's bot limit. Contact the platform team to upgrade.
profile.cycleExpired: Your subscription has expired — register a new payment to reactivate.

company.title: My company
company.subtitle: Workspace details for the tenant your user belongs to. Plan and status are managed by the platform team.
company.platformNote: Plan, status and slug can only be changed by the platform team. To request a plan upgrade or change, contact support.
company.editableSubtitle: What you can change yourself as the workspace owner.
company.companyNameHelp: Shown in the admin panel header and on customer-facing notifications.

botCreate.title: Create bot
botCreate.subtitle: Two things are needed: how the bot should behave, and the WhatsApp Business credentials from Meta. Fine-tuning (tone, fallback, documents) is done later from the bot panel.
botCreate.limitBody: The {plan} plan includes {limit} bot(s), and you already have {used}. Contact the platform team to upgrade and add more.

metaGuide.title: Meta setup guide
metaGuide.subtitle: Follow these steps in order.
metaGuide.step1Body: → New app → add the WhatsApp product.
metaGuide.step2PhoneId: Phone Number ID — WhatsApp → API Setup
metaGuide.step3BodyBefore: Fill the fields in the form on the right and click
metaGuide.step4Body: After saving, copy the Callback URL and Verify token from the bot's Edit screen. Paste them in Meta → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook → Edit.
metaGuide.step5Body: In "Webhook fields" → Manage, check the messages event.
metaGuide.step6BodyBefore: Send a real WhatsApp message to your business number — it should appear in

section.detailsSubtitle: Identity and base behavior — only visible inside the admin.
section.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a friendly sales assistant for…
section.systemPromptHelp: Base instructions the model will receive on every conversation.
section.phoneIdHelp: From the WhatsApp dashboard, next to the test number.
section.wabaIdHelp: WABA ID — useful for templates and metrics.
section.tokenHelp: Stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Starts with EAA.
section.verifyHelp: Set the same value in Meta App → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook.

postCreate.successAfter: was created. Upload knowledge documents below to improve its answers — or skip and add them later.

botConfig.title: Agent configuration
botConfig.subtitleAfter: : tone, personality, response rules, welcome and fallback messages, and the underlying model.
botConfig.scopeNoteMiddle: the agent's brain — what it says and how it sounds. For WhatsApp Business credentials (phone ID, access token, webhook), use

aiBehavior.title: AI behavior
aiBehavior.subtitle: Sent to the model on every conversation — shapes how it speaks.
aiBehavior.personalityPlaceholder: Describe traits: empathetic, concise, uses emojis sparingly…
aiBehavior.responseRulesPlaceholder: Always greet by name. Never quote prices without confirming. Escalate to a human if customer is upset…

messages.title: Conversation messages
messages.subtitle: Fixed copy used at key moments of the chat.
messages.welcomePlaceholder: Hi! I'm Kaibot, your assistant. How can I help today?
messages.welcomeHelp: Sent on the first message of a new conversation.
messages.fallbackPlaceholder: I'm not sure I can help with that. Want me to connect you with a person?
messages.fallbackHelp: Sent when the bot doesn't know how to answer.

modelTiming.title: Model & timing
modelTiming.subtitle: Which AI generates the replies and how fast they're sent.
modelTiming.modelHelp: Pick a suggestion or type a custom model ID.
modelTiming.humanDelayHelp: Pauses before each reply to feel more human. Pick a preset or set a custom value.

followup.title: Inactivity follow-up
followup.subtitle: When the customer stops replying, the bot re-engages with context from the latest topic.
followup.enableHelp: The bot writes a contextual message with the LLM — never empty "how can I help?" greetings.
followup.summaryOff: Off — if the customer stops replying, the bot won't follow up.
followup.summaryOn: After {h} h of silence, the bot follows up with context. Up to {n} attempt(s) (~{total} total).
followup.hoursHelp: How long the customer can stay silent before the bot sends each follow-up.
followup.attemptsHelp: When the limit is reached without a reply, the bot stops following up. The counter resets when the customer writes back.

internal.title: Internal
internal.subtitle: Notes for your team and runtime status. Not sent to the model.
internal.descriptionPlaceholder: What this bot is for, who owns it…
internal.botActiveHelp: When off, the bot doesn't reply to incoming WhatsApp messages.

botEdit.title: Edit bot
botEdit.subtitle: Update how your bot behaves and the WhatsApp Business credentials from Meta. Secrets stay unchanged unless you type a new value.
botEdit.step3PasteHere: Fill the fields in the form on the right and click
botEdit.step4ConfigBody: In Meta → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook → Edit. Paste the Callback URL and Verify token shown in the Webhook section on the right.
botEdit.secretsHelp: For security, current values are never shown. Leave blank to keep the value already on the server.
botEdit.newAppSecretPlaceholder: hex string (leave blank to keep current)
botEdit.newAppSecretHelp: Enables HMAC validation for Meta's webhook payloads.
botEdit.webhookHelp: Paste these two values in Meta App → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook → Edit.
botEdit.callbackHelpAfter: ). Don't share — paste it in Meta's Callback URL field.
botEdit.verifyHelp: Paste the same value in Meta's "Verify token" field. Meta uses it once to confirm you own the webhook endpoint.

botsList.title: Bots
botsList.subtitleStart: Jump straight into any setting for each bot:
botsList.limitReachedBanner: You're using {used} of {limit} bots included in the {plan} plan. Contact the platform team to upgrade and add more.

empty.title: You don't have any bots yet
empty.description: Create the first one to connect it to a WhatsApp number.

bot.deleteConfirmMessage: Its documents, conversations, customers, and integrations will also be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
bot.deleteConfirmTyped: To confirm, type the bot's name:

sections.documentsDesc: Upload .md, .txt or .pdf files — the bot uses them as knowledge context (RAG).
sections.mediaDesc: Images, PDFs, videos, audios, or locations the bot sends as native WhatsApp attachments.
sections.calendarDesc: Connect a Google account so the bot can read availability and book meetings.

bot.pasteInMeta: Paste both in Meta App → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook.

media.cardDescription: Upload images, PDFs, videos, audios, or register locations the bot can send natively over WhatsApp. The model picks by {key} using the description.
media.sizeHint: Images ≤ 5 MB · PDFs ≤ 100 MB · Audio/Video ≤ 16 MB

form.keyHelp: Lowercase a–z, 0–9, dot, dash only. The bot uses this to reference the resource.
form.descriptionHelp: This line tells the bot when to use this resource.

list.emptyBody: Upload your first file or register a location so the bot can send native content.
list.cachedAtMetaTooltip: Meta has this file cached — the next send is instant

media.superadminNotice: Managing resources on a tenant's bot as super-admin.

documents.cardDescription: Plain text (.txt) or Markdown (.md), up to 5 MB. The backend chunks them, embeds them, and uses them as context in every response.
documents.noTextContent: This document has no extractable text content.
documents.stillProcessing: Document is still {status}. Try again once it shows READY.

calendar.escalationSubtitle: Advisor contact info and when the bot should follow up if the case stays pending.
calendar.advisorEmailHelp: When the bot escalates, this address receives the notification. Leave empty to disable escalation.

cases.title: Cases
cases.subtitle: Escalated to a human advisor. Resolve each one from here or from the customer page.

filter.searchPlaceholder: Search by customer, phone, or summary…

list.noMatches: No cases match the current filters.

resolveModal.title: Mark case as resolved
resolveModal.noteBefore: Add an optional note. It will be logged as

card.title: Customer cases
card.subtitle: Escalated to a human advisor
card.emptyBody: When the bot escalates a conversation to an advisor, it'll show up here.
card.followupTooltip: The bot sent a follow-up to the customer
card.resolveModalBody: Add a brief note on how it was resolved (optional). The case will be logged as
card.resolveModalPlaceholder: E.g. Adjusted the May billing charge.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Everyone who has messaged any of your bots, ordered by most recent activity.
customers.searchHint: Match on name (case-insensitive). Customers without a name won't appear in search results.

empty.title: No customers yet
empty.description: Customers appear when someone messages one of your bots.

emptyFiltered.title: No matches
emptyFiltered.description: No customer name matches your search. Try a different term or clear the filters.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.subtitle: All meetings booked by your bots. Filter by bot, customer, or reason, and group as you like.

explorer.searchPlaceholder: Search by customer, phone, email, topic, or bot…
explorer.emptyBody: When one of your bots books a meeting, it'll show up here.
explorer.emptyBodyFiltered: Try another search or clear the filters.

card.title: Booked meetings
card.subtitle: Meeting history with this customer
card.emptyBody: When the bot books a meeting with this customer, it'll show up here.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Inbound and outbound message volume across all your bots.

empty.title: No conversations
empty.description: Adjust the filters or wait for a customer to message you.

detail.composerNote: The message is stored and kept in the history. Outbound delivery to WhatsApp from the agent side is not wired up in the backend yet — confirm with the customer through another channel in the meantime.
detail.closedNote: Conversation closed. It automatically returns to BOT status when the customer sends a new message.
detail.botActiveNote: The bot is responding. Take over the conversation to reply as an agent.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Global platform administration.
login.seedNoteBefore: To create the first super-admin, run in the backend:

dashboard.title: Global dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Health and activity across every tenant on the platform.

recent.title: Recent companies
recent.subtitle: Most recently registered tenants.
recent.emptyBody: Tenants will appear here once they self-register.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Your platform-admin account. Treat this credential carefully — it has global access across every tenant.
profile.warningNote: This account has global access across every tenant. Use a strong, unique password and never share it.
profile.changePasswordSubtitle: You'll stay signed in. Use the new password on your next sign-in.
profile.successMessage: Password updated. Use the new password on your next sign-in.
profile.sessionSubtitle: End your current session on this browser.

empty.title: No companies
empty.description: There are no tenants registered on the platform yet.

companyCreate.title: Create company
companyCreate.subtitle: Provision a new tenant with an OWNER user. The owner will sign in at the tenant login.
companyCreate.slugHelp: Used in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only.
companyCreate.passwordHelp: Minimum 12 characters. The owner can change it after sign-in.

companyEdit.title: Edit company
companyEdit.subtitle: Manage the tenant's billing tier and access. Changes apply immediately for all users in this workspace.
companyEdit.slugHelp: Used in URLs and integrations. Changing it would break existing links.
companyEdit.sectionIdentityHelp: Company name shown in the panel and notifications.
companyEdit.sectionPlanHelp: Billing tier and feature access for this tenant.
companyEdit.sectionAccessHelp: Controls whether users in this tenant can log in.
companyEdit.statusActiveDesc: Users can log in and operate normally.
companyEdit.statusSuspendedDesc: Login is blocked for everyone in this tenant.
companyEdit.suspendedWarningAfter: in this tenant immediately. Their data is preserved and access is restored on re-activation.
companyEdit.deleteConfirmMessage: Bots, users, conversations, customers, documents, and integrations will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
companyEdit.deleteConfirmTyped: To confirm, type the company's name:

quickNav.title: Sections
quickNav.subtitle: Jump to a specific area of this tenant.

companyDetail.noBots: No bots yet for this company.

bots.title: Bots
bots.description: Jump straight into any setting for each bot:

companyDetail.deleteCompanyConfirmMessage: All its users, bots, conversations, and documents will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
companyDetail.deleteBotConfirmMessage: The bot's documents, conversations, customers, and integrations will also be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
companyDetail.deleteBotConfirmTyped: To confirm, type the bot's name:

companyMeetings.title: Meetings
companyMeetings.subtitle: All meetings booked by this company's bots.

companyBilling.title: Billing
companyBilling.subtitle: Active cycle, payment history and manual controls for this tenant.
companyBilling.planSubtitle: Read-only snapshot. Plan changes are made from the company edit page.

companyBotCreate.title: Create bot for this company
companyBotCreate.subtitle: Set up a new bot inside this tenant's workspace.

companyBotDetail.deleteConfirmMessage: Its documents, conversations, customers, and integrations will also be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
companyBotDetail.deleteConfirmTyped: To confirm, type the bot's name:
companyBotDetail.activitySubtitle: Inbound & outbound volume for this bot only.

sections.multimediaDesc: Sendable assets (images, PDFs, videos, audios, locations) the bot can attach natively in WhatsApp.

billing.sweepDescription: Closes overdue cycles and moves tenants to PENDING_PAYMENT. This job runs automatically every day at 03:00 (server time).
billing.cardSubtitle: Current billing cycle and manual payment history.
billing.statusPending: Subscription expired — register a payment to reactivate.
billing.fieldMonthsHint: Select how many months this payment covers (1–12). The amount is computed automatically from the tenant's plan.
billing.fieldFileHint: Deposit image (JPG, PNG, WEBP) or PDF. Max 10 MB.
billing.fieldPaidAtHint: Optional. Audit-only — does not shift the cycle dates.
billing.fieldNotePlaceholder: Deposit reference, bank, wire id, etc.
billing.registerSuccess: Payment registered. The new cycle is active.
billing.deactivateConfirmMessage: Closes the active cycle and marks the tenant as SUSPENDED. The bot will stop replying and users will see an account-suspended message until you register a new payment.

banner.renewSoon: Your subscription expires in {days} day. To keep your bot active, send your proof of payment to {email} before the cutoff. | Your subscription expires in {days} days. To keep your bot active, send your proof of payment to {email} before the cutoff.
banner.renewToday: Your subscription expires today. Send your proof of payment to {email} now to avoid suspension.
banner.pendingPayment: Your subscription has expired and some features are limited. Send your proof of payment to {email} to restore full access.
banner.suspended: Your account is suspended and the bot has stopped replying. Send your proof of payment to {email} to reactivate it.
